stories.title: Per-file code review during implementation
stories.story: As a framework developer, I want each file reviewed immediately after it's written during Phase 06, so that issues are caught while context is hot rather than cold-reviewing in Phase 16/08.

stories.title: Immediate fix cycle for flagged files
stories.story: As a framework developer, I want files flagged by the Reviewer to be immediately fixed by the Updater and re-reviewed, so that each file is clean before the Writer moves on.

stories.title: Orchestrator per-file loop management
stories.story: As the orchestrator agent, I want a per-file loop protocol that delegates to Writer, Reviewer, and Updater in sequence per file, so that I can manage the implementation team without a new phase.

stories.title: Writer role awareness
stories.story: As the software-developer agent in Writer role, I want to know when the per-file loop is active so I produce files one at a time and wait for review before continuing.

stories.title: Phase restructuring (16 and 08)
stories.story: As a framework developer, I want Phase 16 to become a batch-only final sweep and Phase 08 to become human-review-only after per-file reviews happen in Phase 06, so that there's no redundant checking.

stories.title: Backward compatibility when debate is off
stories.story: As a framework developer using --no-debate or light mode, I want Phase 06/16/08 to behave exactly as they do today, so that the per-file loop is opt-in not forced.

stories.title: Implementation routing in orchestrator
stories.story: As the orchestrator, I want a separate IMPLEMENTATION_ROUTING table for Phase 06 because the per-file loop pattern is fundamentally different from the per-artifact debate loop used in Phases 01/03/04.
